sections.paragraph:
Original: ענניה

Transliteration: ‛ănanyâh

Phonetic: an-an-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Ananiah = "Jehovah clouds"
  1. ancestor of Azariah who assisted in rebuilding the city wall in the time of Nehemiah (noun proper masculine)
  2. a city northwest of Jerusalem to which some Benjamite exiles returned (noun proper locative)

Origin: from H6049 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
